feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business Technology Platform
feed.subtitle: SAP Business Technology Platform Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Destination Service failed after deployment - Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
Hello, 

After re-deploying MTA application on BTP I encountered the following error :

"Updating service "*-destination-service" failed: Service broker error: Service broker destination-service-broker failed with: Failed to update the destination service instance with the user provided configuration."

What could be the cause of it?

entry.title: Hiding Workflow Step Names in Business Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

Background:
 
  • We are using SAP Business Process Automation (BPA) in SAP BTP
  • In the My Inbox UI, step names associated with each task are currently displayed at the bottom of open tasks. 

  •  

Objective:

  • We want to hide the step names defined in the workflow from the UI.

Steps Taken So Far:

  1. Workflow Configuration:

    • We have explored the workflow configuration within BPA.
    • We identified the specific step/task for which we want to hide the name .

       

       

  2. UI Customization:

    • We attempted to locate the relevant UI code responsible for rendering the step names.
    • However, we couldn’t find the exact place to make the necessary adjustments.

Request:

  • Have any of you had the same problem and found a possible resolution?
  • Specifically, we want to exclude the step names from the UI while ensuring that the workflow functionality remains intact.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: SAP BTP Documentation for Basis Consultant
entry.content:
Hi all, I want to study about SAP BTP and what is necessary for a SAP Basis consultant. do you know which learning hub guides I should start reading?

 

 

 

thanks.

Eli Daniel Ramones

entry.title: sap hana cloud data temperature
entry.content: in "sap hana cloud" how can I apply the "data temperature", step by step?, thanks

entry.title: SAP MDO Business Object Type Workforce Person: how to delete extension field(s)
entry.content:
Hey guys,
we have a working sandbox environment with SAP MDI receiving employee master data from SuccessFactors Employee Central. We're using SAP MDO Business Object Type "Workforce Person 3.5.0", which has a handful of custom fields customized under "Extension Fields". It is all working fine and the employee master data incl. the extension fields is successfully and correctly imported into the Workforce Person object.

PROBLEM: how can I deactivate/edit/delete custom extension fields?
Example: I have added "Nationality" as an extension field under PersonalDetails (sap.odm.workforce.PersonalDetails). Now I'd like to move the field to ProfileDetails where it really belongs to in my opionion. 

Once the field was activated, there is no option to deactivate and/or edit the field anymore. Also the "Delete"-Button in the extension field list is greyed out, so not even deleting is possible.

Questions:

  • Why is the "Delete"-Button greyed out?
  • What can I do to enable the "Delete"-Button?
  • Why is deactivating not possible (I do not see any action menu)?

Thanks for pointing me into the right direction. I'm really confused here!

entry.title: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'keywords')
entry.content: I am completely beginner to SAP world and about to complete the training, "Building side-by-side extensions on SAP BTP", I stumbled upon such error message and cannot start the CDS application using, cds watch command. It worked in the past but suddenly this happened. npm update and npm ci did NOT work. Can it happen due to any recent updates in package.json dependencies.? Can anyone support with this please? Many thanks.

entry.title: Couldnt able to read SAP DI destination URL from SAP Cloud Application Programming (CAP)
entry.content:
HI Experts,

I am trying to consume SAP Document Information Extraction Service API's from SAP Cloud Application Programming (CAP) and apply some custom logic at CAP level and pass to UI. 

But here when I am trying to access them, I am facing below error

 

Error during request to remote service: The 'url' property is not set for destination btp_document_info_extract which is mandatory if you use it as an 'HTTP destination

 

Adding details like DI Subscription & instance with service key, destination, CAP Code snippet. let me know if more info is needed. 

package.json file

{
    "name": "incident-management",
    "version": "1.0.0",
    "description": "A simple CAP project.",
    "repository": "<Add your repository here>",
    "license": "UNLICENSED",
    "private": true,
    "dependencies": {
        "@sap-cloud-sdk/connectivity": "^3.15.0",
        "@sap-cloud-sdk/http-client": "^3.15.0",
        "@sap-cloud-sdk/mail-client": "^3.15.0",
        "@sap-cloud-sdk/resilience": "^3.15.0",
        "@sap-cloud-sdk/util": "^3.15.0",
        "@sap/cds": "^7",
        "@sap/cds-hana": "^2",
        "@sap/xssec": "^3",
        "express": "^4",
        "passport": "^0.7.0"
    },
    "devDependencies": {
        "@cap-js/sqlite": "^1",
        "@sap/cds-dk": "^7",
        "@sap/eslint-plugin-cds": "^3",
        "@sap/ux-specification": "^1.120.10",
        "axios": "^1.6.8",
        "chai": "^5.1.1",
        "chai-as-promised": "^7.1.2",
        "chai-subset": "^1.6.0",
        "eslint": "^9",
        "jest": "^29.7.0",
        "rimraf": "^3.0.2"
    },
    "scripts": {
        "start": "cds-serve",
        "test": "jest tests/test.js",
        "watch-incidents": "cds watch --open incidents/webapp/index.html?sap-ui-xx-viewCache=false",
        "undeploy": "cf undeploy incident-management --delete-services --delete-service-keys --delete-service-brokers",
        "build": "rimraf resources mta_archives && mbt build --mtar archive",
        "deploy": "cf deploy mta_archives/archive.mtar --retries 1",
        "watch-businesspartners": "cds watch --open businesspartners/webapp/index.html?sap-ui-xx-viewCache=false"
    },
    "sapux": [
        "app/incidents",
        "app/businesspartners"
    ],
    "cds": {
        "requires": {            
            "btp_document_info_extract": {
                "kind": "rest",
                "credentials": {
                    "destination": "btp_document_info_extract",
                    "forwardAuthToken": false
                }
            },
            "API_BUSINESS_PARTNER": {
                "kind": "odata-v2",
                "model": "srv/external/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER",
                "[production]": {
                    "credentials": {
                        "destination": "cap_demo-bupa",
                        "path": "/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER"
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

#SAP Document Information Extraction, SAP Cloud Application Programming Model Node.js SAP Business Technology Platform 

 

Regards,

Sai Nithesh

entry.title: CD/CD with SAP Native HANA Application dev space
entry.content:
SAP Experts,
Does SAP HANA Native application type of Dev Space inside SAP Business Application Studio supports SAP Continuous Integration and Delivery  integration to transport objects across different spaces?Because most of the blogs that I visited says that CAP based project is the pre-requisite. 

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Error during Table Data Import in SAP HANA Cloud Database Explorer
entry.content:
Hi,

I am facing error during importing csv table data file in SAP HANA Database Explorer. PFB image.

Note - This error is intermittent; sometimes import is working fine and sometimes its giving above error.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: How to create a table in SAP HANA Cloud Database with end user's input
entry.content:
I am a CAPM developer, as I'm new to this technology I need some suggestions.

I have a requirement of creating a table in SAP HANA Database with end user's input from the UI. Is that possible to create a table without defining the entity in schema and also view that table in the UI using SAP Fiori elements. Please help me with your suggestion.

 

Thanks & Regards
Sudha.

entry.title: SAP IAS user creation under group using Identity Directory API
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am trying to create an external user using the IAS IDP, To achieve this I am using the standard IAS Directory API. External user is getting created but the group is not assigned. I am mapping group parameters under the corporate group schema values, even then it is just creating a user but not assigning the group.

Below are the steps I am following to create user Id :

  1. login to SAP business accelerator hub.
  2. search for Identity directory API.
  3. select the Post action under the User section, that will allow you create the external user.
  4. configure your environment variable
  5. map the input parameters at post action level including the corporate group values.
  6. click on try out , it will create the user at subaccount level but group is not assigned.

Could you please help or suggest me any blog to resolve this issue.

Thanks & Regards,

Rupesh

entry.title: How to create a Dynamic entity and view that table in UI using SAP Fiori elements
entry.content:
I am a CAPM developer , As I'm new to this technology I need some suggestions from you.

I have a requirement of creating a table in SAP HANA Cloud Database with end user's input from the UI. Is it possible to create a table without defining the entity in schema and also view that table in the UI using SAP Fiori elements. Please help me with your suggestion.

Thanks & Regards. 
Livingston Immanual.

entry.title: SAP Build Apps Import Error
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am learning from https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/build-apps-cap-app.html tutorial.

I am getting error while importing RiskManagement.mtar file to https://ABCDEtrial.us10.build.cloud.sap/lobby  (My SAP BTP Trial account).

I can upload RiskManagement.gpg file to lobby provided in above tutorial without any errors.

How can I identify gap in my BAS code.

Application is developed in BAS tool and able to fetch data from 

"curl https://RiskManagement-RiskManagementService.dest/Risks" command. 

 

 

 

Thank you in Advance.

Prasanna

entry.title: Connecting Splash BI tool to S4HANA and BW4HANA
entry.content: There is a non-SAP tool known as Splash BI used for reporting. For one of the demand we need to integrate it with S/4HANA and BW/4HANA for reporting but issue is that we unable to find any connector in both .So please let us know how we can integrate SAP systems to Splash BI.

entry.title: API Hub Creation failed
entry.content:
Hello, I was following the tutorial:
https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/develop-full-stack-applications-using-productivity-tools-in-sap-business-application-studio/consuming-an-external-service-from-sap-s-4hana_faa318cd-9b48-48c4-b5fc-e6c205fb7685

But I am not able to create the API Business Hub. That is why I am stuck at the following step: Consuming an External Service From SAP S/4HANA
How do I fix it? Is it for paid plans only?

entry.title: OData development & Registration on SAP BTP
entry.content:
Hi,

We currently having a centralized deployment [Hub Model] of SAP Gateway , wherein we develop and register OData services. Since we are having an objective to replace the on-premise SAP Gateway instance during the cloud migration, we would like to know whether  any BTP services are available for OData development & registration in cloud . Not sure whether OData provisioning services is meant for that?

Kindly advice.

Regards,

entry.title: SAP build Process Automation is not capturing SAP GUI window completely
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are trying to capture SAP GUI screen through build process automation, but it is not loading complete screen.

Please suggest how we can capture screen completely.

entry.title: Is it possible to combine multiple Fiori floor plans to create a single application
entry.content:
Hi all ,
     In my case, I want to develop an application with custom Fiori UI and also List and object page as well, need to navigate between multiple paged so , I thought of combining both basic and List report floor plan of Fiori UI.
    Using List report floor plan will increase my productivity and Basic Floor plan will increase flexibility.

    Is it possible to combine those floorplans to develop a single application?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Error while creating a decisions in Build Process Automation - Again?
entry.content:
I'm trying to add a decision object to a SAP Build Process Automation project. After creating and configuring the decision I close the decision configuration screen and can see that the decision object found in the overview of objects in the project is stored with a almost transparent font.

 The decision object disappears (automatically deleted) in the overview of objects on the project.

I have raised similar question previously (Solved: Error while creating a decision - SAP Community) and the issue was solved. But it seems like the issue with decision creations in Build Process Automation occurs again. 

Has anyone done the same observations?

entry.title: 2nd Problem calling on Excel Data with Process Automation
entry.content: Something seems to have changed, and I can no longer link excel worksheets to my automation. The screenshot "current member fail.jpg" should allow me to select a value that looks like that in "value should be.jpg".
